message:
Command `# Get GPIO register addresses
grep -n "localparam.*ADDR\|localparam.*REG\|REG_\|12'h\|MODER\|ODR\|IDR\|AFRL\|AFRH" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_GPIO/rtl/nc_gpio.v | head -40
echo "---"
# Check the GPIO register summary
head -300 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_GPIO/rtl/nc_gpio.v | grep -E "register|addr|offset|MODER|ODR|IDR" | head -30` executed with exit code 0.
